Operation 'subscribeWorkerHire' has semantic quality issues: missing_input_details, missing_output_details, missing_side_effects. The current description is too minimal for AI agent usability. It lacks critical details about authentication requirements, expected request parameters (callback/webhook configuration), response structure (subscription ID, status), and the persistent nature of the subscription. Added these details to help AI agents understand how to properly configure and manage the subscription.

data.current_description: Subscribe to receive notifications when new workers are hired.
data.description_suggestion: Subscribes to worker hire events to receive real-time notifications when new workers are hired in the organization. Requires authentication via OAuth 2.0. The request should include subscription configuration details such as callback URL or webhook endpoint. Returns a subscription confirmation with a subscription ID and status. Creates a persistent event subscription that will deliver notifications until explicitly unsubscribed.
data.reasoning: The current description is too minimal for AI agent usability. It lacks critical details about authentication requirements, expected request parameters (callback/webhook configuration), response structure (subscription ID, status), and the persistent nature of the subscription. Added these details to help AI agents understand how to properly configure and manage the subscription.

data.current_description: Subscribe to receive notifications when workers are terminated.
data.description_suggestion: Subscribes to worker termination events to receive real-time notifications when workers are terminated or separated from the organization. Requires authentication via OAuth 2.0. The request should include subscription configuration details such as callback URL or webhook endpoint. Returns a subscription confirmation with a subscription ID and status. Creates a persistent event subscription that will deliver notifications until explicitly unsubscribed.
data.reasoning: Similar to subscribeWorkerHire, the current description lacks essential details for AI agent interpretation. Missing information about authentication, request parameters (callback/webhook configuration), response structure (subscription ID, status), and subscription persistence. Enhanced description provides these critical details and uses domain-appropriate terminology consistent with the Events tag and OAuth 2.0 security scheme.

message: Operation 'listWorkers' has semantic quality issues: vague_summary, missing_input_details, missing_output_details. Original summary is too generic. Description lacks details about pagination, filtering capabilities, and return structure. Enhanced version clarifies input parameters (filtering/sorting), output format (WorkerListResponse), and helps AI agents understand filtering capabilities for targeted queries.

data.current_description: Retrieve a list of workers (employees) in the organization.
data.description_suggestion: Retrieves a paginated list of workers (employees) in the organization. Supports filtering and sorting via query parameters. Returns a WorkerListResponse containing worker objects with core employment information including name, ID, employment status, and organizational assignment.
data.reasoning: Original summary is too generic. Description lacks details about pagination, filtering capabilities, and return structure. Enhanced version clarifies input parameters (filtering/sorting), output format (WorkerListResponse), and helps AI agents understand filtering capabilities for targeted queries.

message: Operation 'getWorker' has semantic quality issues: missing_input_details, missing_output_details. Summary is clear and action-oriented. Description needs enhancement to specify what Worker object contains, clarify the required AOID parameter, and document error conditions (404) for better AI agent error handling.

data.current_description: Retrieve a specific worker's details by their associate OID.
data.description_suggestion: Retrieves detailed information for a specific worker identified by their Associate OID (AOID). Returns a Worker object containing employment details, personal information, organizational assignment, and employment status. Requires valid AOID parameter. Returns 404 if worker not found.
data.reasoning: Summary is clear and action-oriented. Description needs enhancement to specify what Worker object contains, clarify the required AOID parameter, and document error conditions (404) for better AI agent error handling.
